title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at NSE

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at NSE
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
